# Sari AI — LLMs.txt

> Sari is an AI-powered sales automation platform for WhatsApp, designed for e-commerce merchants in Saudi Arabia and the Arab world.

## What is Sari?

Sari (ساري) is a SaaS platform that connects to your online store (Salla, Zid, WooCommerce) and provides an AI chatbot on WhatsApp that can:

- **Answer customer questions** about products, prices, and availability in natural Arabic conversation
- **Process orders** directly through WhatsApp chat
- **Recover abandoned carts** by sending smart follow-up messages
- **Track shipments** and notify customers of delivery status
- **Send marketing campaigns** to targeted customer segments
- **Manage loyalty programs** with points and rewards
- **Generate invoices** and payment links
- **Provide 24/7 customer support** without human intervention

## Key Features

- AI Sales Agent: GPT-powered chatbot trained on your product catalog
- Multi-Platform Integration: Salla, Zid, WooCommerce, and manual product entry
- Campaign Automation: Scheduled campaigns, occasion-based messages, review requests
- Customer Management: CRM with full conversation history and purchase analytics
- Booking System: Appointment scheduling with calendar integration
- Analytics Dashboard: Revenue tracking, conversation metrics, customer insights
- Competitor Analysis: AI-powered market intelligence
- Website Analysis: Extract product data from any website using AI

## Pricing

- Free Plan: Basic features, limited messages
- Pro Plan: Full features, priority support
- Advanced Plan: Enterprise features, custom integrations

## Industry Solutions

Sari provides specialized AI solutions for specific industries:

- **Clinics & Medical Centers**: Appointment booking, patient reminders, doctor schedule management via WhatsApp
- **Restaurants & Cafés**: Order-by-chat, smart menu, delivery tracking, table reservations
- **Salons & Beauty Centers**: Booking, specialist management, loyalty programs, marketing campaigns
- **Training Centers**: Course registration, e-payment, class reminders, certificate delivery
- **Real Estate**: Property listings, lead qualification, viewing booking, auto follow-up
- **Consultants & Law Firms**: Consultation booking, advance payment, session management, client follow-up

## Technology

Built with React 19, tRPC, Drizzle ORM, and Express. Supports Arabic (RTL) and English.

## Contact

Website: https://sary.live
